privileged_info_summary: The task requires configuring Matomo 5.0.0 (released December 19, 2023) in an air-gapped network environment by disabling outbound network communications. The configuration file is located at /var/www/html/config/config.ini.php inside the matomo-app Docker container. Three critical settings must be added to the [General] section: enable_internet_features=0 (disables automatic updates, marketplace checks, and internet-dependent widgets), enable_marketplace=0 (disables plugin marketplace functionality), and enable_update_communication=0 (disables update notification emails). All three configuration options are official Matomo settings documented in the FAQ and verified through GitHub pull requests and issues.
